title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. Nami turns fear into strategy and starts using the Clima-Tact to survive Miss Doublefinger. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.text: Alubarma Southern Block, Battle at Polka St.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Alubanna Palace

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Prepare as much gunpow-der as we have!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I can't believe we're seriously doing this...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: What will become of Alabama's history...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please wait a little longer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The prepa- rations will soon be complete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm at a loss,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As to how to explain the current situation if his highness were here right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's fine, we understand. You had no choice but to respond to the rebel threat...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You've done a commendable job in quelling unrest for the past two years without lgaram...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm sorry too,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: For leaving this country all of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: administration of the following

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...But it's not over yet! Even if we manage to stop the rebels,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As long as that man remains alive... This country will never see peace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I just hope they're all alive and well...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You have to survive no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So no matter what happens to any of us here,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You have to continue on...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Princess Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In the two years since you've been gone,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You've changed so much for the better.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I would love to invite your pirate friends to a banquet after this is all over,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And learn what kind of people they are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: feed me.

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Once I kick crocodile's ass, feed me til I explode.

dialogue.text: Com- Mander Chaka!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What is it!?
